# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

It is an arXiv preprint with clear empirical substance: a new benchmark, dataset/task construction details, validation setup, explicit quantitative results, and a reported capability gap between SWE-EVO and SWE-Bench Verified. That meets the institute bar for a serious preprint reporting real experimental results.

## Limits
